title: Hickety Pickety My Black Hen
content:
Hickety Pickety My Black Hen.


Hickety, pickety, my black hen,
    She lays eggs for gentlemen;



Gentlemen come every day
To see what my black hen doth lay.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Leonard Leslie Brooke delivers a powerful performance in "Hickety Pickety My Black Hen"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
